title: Nick Jameson
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Citation}}
{{Person
|image=[[File:NickJameson.png]]
|name=Nick Jameson
|birth=
|death=
|listedpronouns=<!--Only include pronouns if they have been explicitly specified by the individual to which this article pertains.-->
|nationality=
|occupation=
|companies=
|website=
}}'''Nick Jameson''' is an American actor and voice actor. He voiced in a large variety of ''[[Star Wars]]'' projects. Considered by some to be the "audio-double" for [[Ian McDiarmid]], he has voiced [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] in various different forms. He also played [[Aito Laff]] in [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']].
